document.docTitle: Crassula schimperi subsp. phyturus R. Fern.
document.masterDocTitle: Annotated checklist of the vascular plants of Mount Kenya, East Africa

subSubSection.paragraph: Crassula schimperi Fisch. & C.A.Mey. subsp. phyturus (Mildbr.) R.Fern. —
Habitat: LMWF, LMDF, BZ, UMF, HZ, AZ; up to 4 100 m. Distribution: II.
Voucher: Sirimon Track, Alt. 2 938 m, 8 Jan. 2014, SAJIT 001639 (HIB).
